seoTitle: Weranga vs West End — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Weranga and West End. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Weranga vs West End: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Weranga and West End.
heading: Weranga vs West End — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weranga, Queensland and West End, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Weranga has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to West End (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weranga or West End safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weranga has a flood risk score of 21/100, while West End scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weranga scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. West End scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weranga or West End?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Weranga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
